title: autopilot config
description: Project-level autopilot configuration. Written by apply.{ps1,sh} on template install; hand-edit to change.

project_description.description: One-paragraph description used by the agent for context.

product_directive.description: The north-star product directive. Embedded into PROMPT.md IMMUTABLE block.

operator_language.description: IETF BCP-47 language tag (en, ko, ja, zh-CN, es, fr, de, ...). Operator-facing output uses this.

template_version.description: Template revision this project was bootstrapped from.

autopilot_ai.description: Which AI the runner pipes PROMPT.md to.

next_delay_default.description: Default wait seconds between iters when NEXT_DELAY is unset.

search_roots.description: Project tree roots the agent prefers when grepping/globbing. Auto-detected at apply time; hand-edit to add project-specific paths.

sensitive_delete_paths.description: Path prefixes whose deletion requires a 'cleanup-operator-approved: yes' commit trailer. Enforced by .autopilot/hooks/commit-msg-protect.sh. Auto-populated at apply time with detected source/test/docs trees; always includes 'Document/' for the DAD dialogue history.

runtime_evidence_tags.description: Project-specific Active-Task tags that trigger the F39 runtime-evidence admission gate, in addition to the default engine-agnostic set ([ui], [ux], [ux-visible], [runtime], [e2e], [smoke]). Add tags like [playmode]/[scene]/[battle] for Unity projects, [browser]/[a11y] for web projects, [device]/[hw] for embedded, etc. Each tag must include the brackets, e.g. "[playmode]".

stale_draft_pr_hours.description: F44 stale-state validator threshold: open draft PRs not updated within this many hours are flagged as stale. Default 72h (3 days).

skip_draft_pr_check.description: F44: set true to skip the gh-based draft-PR check. Useful in CI environments where gh isn't authenticated as the autopilot identity, or in repos that don't use draft PRs as the WIP convention.

draft_pr_branch_prefix.description: F44: optional filter — when non-empty, only draft PRs whose head branch starts with this prefix are checked for staleness. Example: "dev/autopilot-" to ignore non-autopilot drafts.
